defs.d: All xlink/uses/triggers targets resolve to existing IDs.
Every def has id+term, every thm has id+statement, every xlink has from+to.
Module hash matches sha256 of content; mismatch = tamper alert.
Module deps resolve to MANIFEST entries.
Source natural scope must match query domain.
Linked content must be factual domain material.
Original source must pass all upstream gates.
Verify sender claims against modules before building on them.
Assign provenance tier to each output claim.
kb-query emits NO_MODULE_MATCH when domain module returns no results.

autogate._design_note: Gates are partitioned into machine-checkable (enforced by validate_knowledge.py at edit time) and LLM-interpreted (natural language guidance for Claude at runtime). Pseudo-formal notation removed from gates that have no computable implementation.

ReferenceGate.rule: All xlink/uses/triggers targets resolve to existing IDs

SchemaGate.rule: Every def has id+term, every thm has id+statement, every xlink has from+to

HashGate.rule: Module hash matches sha256 of content; mismatch = tamper alert

DependencyGate.rule: Module deps resolve to MANIFEST entries

ScopeGate.guidance: Prefer sources whose natural scope matches the query domain. Reject sources from lifestyle, advocacy, or sponsored contexts.

CategoryGate.guidance: Exclude magazine, lifestyle, and advocacy-biased sources from factual claims.

BiasGate.guidance: When a source shows predictive bleed (conclusions preceding evidence), downweight or replace with in-band alternative.

ContentGate.guidance: Linked content must be factual domain material. Reject opinion pieces and sponsored content as grounding sources.

ProvenanceGate.guidance: Original source must pass scope, category, bias, and content checks before use.

PremiseGate.guidance: Verify each sender factual claim against def/fact/thm in loaded modules before building on it. Match: proceed. Conflict: flag, provide grounded value, ask sender to clarify. No match: flag as unverified, ask for source. Do not adopt unverified claims without caveat. Curiosity over rejection.

FabricationGate.guidance: Assign provenance tier to each output claim. T1: resolves to module entry, present as grounded. T2: derived from module content via reasoning, show chain, mark [T2-INFERRED]. T3: domain module exists but claim does not resolve, mark [!] UNGROUNDED. No domain module loaded: respond normally, no tier obligation. Tier inheritance: conclusion built on T3 premise inherits T3.

retrieval_augmented._note: These annotations are added by kb-query at retrieval time, not by Claude's judgment.

NoMatchFlag.rule: When kb-query returns zero results for a domain with a loaded module, output includes: [NO_MODULE_MATCH — all outputs T2+ by default]

tags.TIER1: Output claim resolves to def/fact/thm in loaded module — grounded, authoritative
tags.TIER2: Output claim derived from module content via reasoning — show chain, mark [T2-INFERRED]
tags.TIER3: Domain module exists but claim does not resolve — mark [!] UNGROUNDED, training-weight origin

rules: Every thm: >= 1 src ref + provenance tag
I2 outputs: explicit uncertainty language required
xlinks: bidirectional, both ends must resolve

ambiguity.negation: Double negation resolved before output. Negation scope explicit.
ambiguity.unverified: No src resolves -> output [UNVERIFIED — no source in loaded modules]

vocab.term_lock: Defined terms in defs[] used consistently. Synonyms require crosswalk entry.
vocab.controlled_vocab: Domain terms must appear in a module defs[] before use in facts/thms.

policy: Each module: self-hash over sorted JSON content
MANIFEST.fused_hash: over all module hashes in load_order
Edit -> invalidates module hash + fused hash
hash_chain.status: PARTIAL — validate_knowledge.py checks hash on edit; runtime chain not implemented

scope: dialect ambiguity checks on sample outputs

src_map.GOVERNANCE: Self-referential — gate defined in this module
src_map.kb-query: Retrieval-time annotation — implemented in kb-query script
